_comment_direct: Direct mode: this device authenticates to CSCS itself. Each user listed here counts toward the 5-key quota.
_comment_proxy: Proxy mode: replace the whole file with the block below. The Worker holds the CSCS credentials; this device only fetches the latest cert. The token is moved to the OS keyring (or ~/.config/cscs-keygen/proxy_token if no keyring backend) on first run and removed from this file.
